title: Bridge Essay: Frontopolar theta oscillations link metacognition with prospective decision maki

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dashboard Diagnosis** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Metacognition — self-awareness, self-monitoring, neural correlates of meta-awareness.

**Frontopolar theta oscillations link metacognition with prospective decision making.**. Nat Commun.. PMID: 34168135. DOI: 10.1038/s41467-021-24197-3. Prospective decision making considers the future consequences of actions and therefore requires agents to represent their present subjective preferences reliably across time. Here, we test the link of frontopolar theta oscillations to both metacognitive ability and prospective choice behavior.
